mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies (id, title, original_title, overview, poster_path, backdrop_path, release_date, category, vote_average, vote_count, popularity, adult, original_language, video, runtime, budget, revenue, status, homepage) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{overview}, #{posterPath}, #{backdropPath}, #{releaseDate}, #{category}, #{voteAverage}, #{voteCount}, #{popularity}, #{adult}, #{originalLanguage}, #{video}, #{runtime}, #{budget}, #{revenue}, #{status}, #{homepage}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), original_title = VALUES(original_title), overview = VALUES(overview), poster_path = VALUES(poster_path), backdrop_path = VALUES(backdrop_path), release_date = VALUES(release_date), category = VALUES(category), vote_average = VALUES(vote_average), vote_count = VALUES(vote_count), popularity = VALUES(popularity), adult = VALUES(adult), original_language = VALUES(original_language), video = VALUES(video), runtime = VALUES(runtime), budget = VALUES(budget), revenue = VALUES(revenue), status = VALUES(status), homepage = VALUES(homepage);
